holdings.n: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation

holdings.infoBox: DAK is an equity ETF with a total of 171 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 5.62%, iShares Core S&P 500 ETF at 3.73%, Alphabet at 3.67%, Vanguard S&P 500 ETF at 3.45%, and Analog Devices at 2.98%.

overview.description: The Dakota Active Equity ETF (DAK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US stocks via individual holdings or sector ETFs. The fund pursues a tactical investment strategy, seeking companies with a leading market position and positive fundamentals DAK was launched on Jul 29, 2025 and is issued by Dakota.
